headline: Manchester’s trusted 24/7 plumbing rapid-response team
subheadline: Gas-safe engineers, clean site policy, and first-visit success guarantee.
about_text: RapidFlow Plumbing is a team of local Manchester specialists for high-risk leaks, broken boilers, and winter burst emergencies.

services.title: Boiler Emergency Repair
services.description: Swift diagnostics and safe replacements for failing boilers.

services.title: Blocked Drain Clearing
services.description: High-pressure jetting and preventive scaffolding works.

services.title: Commercial Leaks
services.description: Catering to building managers and retail estates with rapid compliance reporting.

reviews.name: Sarah P.
reviews.quote: Zero drama from booking to completion; they handled our busy shop unit discreetly.

reviews.name: Greg F.
reviews.quote: The team arrived on time and kept me in the loop every step.

faqs.question: Do you handle insurance claims?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide documented repair reports and partner with major insurers.

faqs.question: Can I pre-book a weekend slot?
faqs.answer: All weekend visits are available with priority and no-Saturday premium.

service_area_text: Serving Greater Manchester and satellite towns quickly and reliably.
trust_proof: Top-rated across UK small business listings
Bespoke emergency fleet with own spare parts

metadata.title: RapidFlow Plumbing | Manchester Emergency Plumbers
metadata.description: RapidFlow repairs plumbing faults across Manchester, with evening and weekend openings.
